jokes.text: Jesus Beverly Christ
jokes.setup: Standard blasphemous exclamation
jokes.punchline: Beverly inserted as middle name like a preppy WASP
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina malapropism - transforms blasphemy into something absurdly bougie. Perfect character voice.

jokes.text: If it was any more Kennedy-esque, it would drive you into the ocean
jokes.setup: Description of classy Eastern Shore location
jokes.punchline: Reference to Chappaquiddick incident
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark callback to Ted Kennedy scandal. Perfect economy and structure with unexpected turn.

jokes.text: Fittingly, I lost my back-virginity in Assateague
jokes.setup: Discussing the classy Eastern Shore location
jokes.punchline: Selina overshares about anal sex on a nature preserve
jokes.explanation: Pure Selina - inappropriate oversharing that destroys any dignity. 'Back-virginity' is perfectly crude.

jokes.text: I once lost my wallet in Denver
jokes.setup: Selina's sexual overshare about losing virginity
jokes.punchline: Gary's innocent, literal response about losing an object
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary moment - completely missing sexual subtext with earnest literal response.

jokes.text: No, ma'am, you have a meeting with Tanz at 2:00. - Oh, thank you very much, Richard
jokes.setup: Richard clarifying meeting time vs location confusion
jokes.punchline: Selina sarcastically thanking him for basic competence
jokes.explanation: Standard Selina condescension to staff, mildly amusing but predictable.

jokes.text: He was a friend to all people, especially corporations, who he legally considered to be people
jokes.setup: Generic praise for dead Supreme Court justice
jokes.punchline: Cutting reference to Citizens United corporate personhood
jokes.explanation: Sharp political satire about corporate personhood delivered as faux eulogy praise.

jokes.text: there is absolutely no validity to the rumor that the president is being considered for the seat
jokes.setup: Reporter asks about Montez considering someone for Supreme Court
jokes.punchline: Mike denies rumor about 'the president' when asked about Meyer
jokes.explanation: Mike's confusion about which president they mean shows his scattered mental state.

jokes.text: I just habitually deny everything these days. It gets me in trouble with Wendy, too
jokes.setup: Mike explaining his press conference mistake
jokes.punchline: Admits to pathological lying even to his wife
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Mike's professional incompetence bleeding into personal life.

jokes.text: The other day, I flushed a comb down the toilet
jokes.setup: Mike about to give example of denying everything
jokes.punchline: Completely mundane, inexplicable thing to lie about
jokes.explanation: Perfect absurd Mike detail - why would anyone flush a comb or lie about it?

jokes.text: I do wanna hear the end of that, though
jokes.setup: Selina cuts off Mike's rambling examples
jokes.punchline: But admits curiosity about the comb story
jokes.explanation: Nice character beat showing Selina's morbid curiosity despite wanting efficiency.

jokes.text: You do like throwing books at people
jokes.setup: Jane asking if she'd make a good judge
jokes.punchline: Literal interpretation of 'throwing the book' at criminals
jokes.explanation: Simple wordplay joke, competent but not particularly clever or original.

jokes.text: Plus, reading... could it be bad for your child's self-esteem? Why one Texas housewife wants to phase it out
jokes.setup: Danny promoting upcoming TV segments
jokes.punchline: Completely insane anti-literacy story premise
jokes.explanation: Brilliant satire of morning show anti-intellectualism taken to absurd extreme.

jokes.text: I thought my charm campaign was turning into a bit of a death march, but I think I breached her defenses
jokes.setup: Danny talking about winning over Jane
jokes.punchline: Military metaphors for basic workplace courtesy
jokes.explanation: Shows Danny's narcissistic view of basic professional interaction as strategic conquest.

jokes.text: I want a full fucking beaver shot with the legs. Otherwise, what is the point?
jokes.setup: Danny giving camera directions during commercial break
jokes.punchline: Extremely inappropriate sexual reference about camera angles
jokes.explanation: Classic Danny sexual inappropriateness in workplace, perfectly in character but fairly predictable.

jokes.text: I'm starting to look like a diversity hire here
jokes.setup: Danny complaining about too much bronzer
jokes.punchline: Completely tone-deaf complaint about looking diverse
jokes.explanation: Perfect Danny obliviousness about privilege and workplace dynamics.

jokes.text: If I wanted people to think that I actually still cared about them, I would've stayed in fucking politics
jokes.setup: Danny explaining his media career motivations
jokes.punchline: Admits media is even more cynical than politics
jokes.explanation: Sharp cynical observation about media vs politics, perfectly delivered by Danny.

jokes.text: as a female, do you feel that... - Pass!
jokes.setup: Mike starting predictable gendered memoir question
jokes.punchline: Selina immediately rejecting it
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy - Selina's immediate rejection of cliched gender question before it's even finished.

jokes.text: Madam Pardoner. Don't mention it. Ever.
jokes.setup: Sherman greeting Selina with reference to her pardoning him
jokes.punchline: Selina immediately shutting down any mention of the pardon
jokes.explanation: Good callback to Selina's corruption scandal with immediate damage control.

jokes.text: The miserable anti-Semite, but a great friend of Israel
jokes.setup: Sherman describing Nixon
jokes.punchline: Contradictory assessment of Nixon's relationship with Jews
jokes.explanation: Sharp political observation about Nixon's complex relationship with Jewish voters and Israel.

jokes.text: Uh-huh, you're stalling. It must be a big number.
jokes.setup: Sherman rambling about his father and Bebe Rebozo
jokes.punchline: Selina cutting through bullshit to the money ask
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina - cutting through small talk to get to the transactional reality.

jokes.text: You have back trouble? You know what helps? Bananas. The potassium.
jokes.setup: Sherman noticing Selina's discomfort
jokes.punchline: Offering completely useless banana advice
jokes.explanation: Mildly amusing rich old man giving useless health advice with false authority.

jokes.text: What, no massage? Gary, massage him. Mm-mm. Mm-hmm.
jokes.setup: Selina offering Sherman a heating pad
jokes.punchline: Escalating to making Gary give Sherman a massage
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment of Selina pimping out Gary for donor money, with Gary's reluctant compliance.

jokes.text: What time? / Memoir time. / Oh, God.
jokes.setup: Mike announcing it's time for memoir work
jokes.punchline: Selina's disgusted reaction to her own book project
jokes.explanation: Simple running gag about Selina's reluctance to work on her memoir. Functional but not exceptional.

jokes.text: Just go deep. Just go deep for him, yes.
jokes.setup: Gary reluctantly massaging Sherman
jokes.punchline: Selina's sexual innuendo about massage technique
jokes.explanation: Fairly predictable sexual innuendo, but delivered with Selina's characteristic obliviousness.

jokes.text: our prison system is in grave danger of dropping below 135% occupancy
jokes.setup: Sherman complaining about prison reform
jokes.punchline: Treating overpopulation as underpopulation problem
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark satire of private prison industry treating human suffering as business metric.

jokes.text: Well, I think that I'm partially to blame for that because I let you out of one
jokes.setup: Sherman complaining about declining prison population
jokes.punchline: Selina taking credit for his release from prison
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback with perfect timing - Selina can't help but take credit even for corruption.

jokes.text: we can find you a man or a woman, but it'll probably be a man if you wanna get anything done
jokes.setup: Sherman asking for someone from Congress to help
jokes.punchline: Casually sexist remark from female ex-president
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina hypocrisy - internalized sexism from someone who broke glass ceilings.

jokes.text: I want you to get in touch with Ed McPherson on Judiciary 'cause he's building an infinity pool. On it. Too late.
jokes.setup: Selina explaining which congressman to bribe
jokes.punchline: Richard instantly knowing the corruption angle and that it's already too late
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing Richard's unexpected competence at corruption and DC insider knowledge.

jokes.text: CNN just came out with their speculative list of nominees for the open Supreme Court seat... and they have you as a long shot's long shot
jokes.setup: Mike delivering news about Supreme Court speculation
jokes.punchline: Selina ranked absurdly low on possibility list
jokes.explanation: Good setup for Selina's delusions - even being mentioned is treated as victory despite terrible odds.

jokes.text: Oh, it's cnn.com. Oh, well, nobody looks at that.
jokes.setup: Gary clarifying it's online CNN coverage
jokes.punchline: Selina immediately dismissing digital media relevance
jokes.explanation: Good character beat showing Selina's old-media mindset and ability to rationalize away bad news.

jokes.text: My tits feel like these Hot Pockets
jokes.setup: Selina complaining about being hot
jokes.punchline: Grotesque comparison of breasts to microwaved snacks
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina vulgarity - specific, disgusting, and completely inappropriate for any context.

jokes.text: Hey, don't fucking say that, okay? It's not that. Seriously, that is like a sexist-beyond-sexist reaction.
jokes.setup: Gary suggesting Selina might be going through menopause
jokes.punchline: Selina calling medical diagnosis sexist while having literal heart attack
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dramatic irony - Selina's reflexive feminism while literally having heart attack she's misdiagnosing.

jokes.text: Mike's hair reminds me of graham cracker crumbs
jokes.setup: Selina listing reasons she's uncomfortable
jokes.punchline: Oddly specific visual comparison of Mike's hair
jokes.explanation: Perfect weird Selina observation - specific, mean, and visually accurate in an unsettling way.

jokes.text: Good news is without the tampons, it's gonna free up some space in my bag. Where are you gonna put yours?
jokes.setup: Gary trying to be supportive about menopause
jokes.punchline: Asking where Selina will put HIS tampons
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary moment - reveals he carries tampons for Selina while completely missing social cues.

jokes.text: I pardoned 'Typhoid Moishe'
jokes.setup: Selina realizing mistake of working with Sherman
jokes.punchline: Ridiculous nickname for the criminal she pardoned
jokes.explanation: Great callback with perfect nickname - combines historical disease reference with Jewish stereotype.

jokes.text: Super left field? I mean, is that even a position? Mm-hmm, that was my position in Little League. I was a pitcher's helper.
jokes.setup: TV commentator calling Selina 'super left field' choice
jokes.punchline: Gary's earnest baseball confusion and made-up position
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary innocence - missing metaphor and inventing child-like baseball position.

jokes.text: It's hot flashy. / It's totally normal.
jokes.setup: Richard asking about Selina's temperature
jokes.punchline: Selina's casual description of hot flashes, Richard's matter-of-fact response
jokes.explanation: Good wordplay on hot flashes and Richard's characteristic matter-of-fact response to everything.

jokes.text: What are you telling me? I think you had a small heart attack. A heart attack? Yes, ma'am. So, I'm not menopausal?
jokes.setup: Doctor delivering serious heart attack diagnosis
jokes.punchline: Selina focusing on not being menopausal as the relief
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character moment - Selina's vanity trumps life-threatening diagnosis. Perfect callback structure.

jokes.text: Hand me a cracker and spread it up with 'I Can't Believe It's Not Menopause'
jokes.setup: Doctor saying heart attack is more serious than menopause
jokes.punchline: Selina making butter substitute pun about her diagnosis relief
jokes.explanation: Exceptional wordplay combining brand reference with medical relief. Peak Selina inappropriate response to crisis.

jokes.text: You wanna knock me up, Doc? Just 'cause I can do it.
jokes.setup: Doctor urgently saying they need to get to hospital
jokes.punchline: Selina interpreting as sexual invitation and bragging about fertility
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina inappropriate sexual misinterpretation during medical emergency.

jokes.text: You know what I like about you two? It's not clear who's the top. I am.
jokes.setup: Dan observing Catherine and Marjorie's relationship
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate sexual comment followed by Marjorie's assertion
jokes.explanation: Typical Dan inappropriate observation with good character response from Marjorie.

jokes.text: You could have direct sexual intercourse with the donor
jokes.setup: Doctor suggesting streamlined fertility process
jokes.punchline: Clinical description of threesome as medical procedure
jokes.explanation: Good absurd medical deadpan delivery of completely inappropriate suggestion.

jokes.text: Why don't we just puppy pile, okay? Then we'll all get a bite to eat afterwards, you know. See a movie or something. You know, we'll make it nice.
jokes.setup: Doctor suggesting direct intercourse for fertility
jokes.punchline: Dan treating threesome like casual hangout with dinner and movie
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dan moment - treating bizarre sexual situation with casual social planning.

jokes.text: I'm just the cream filling in this gay-claire
jokes.setup: Doctor asking if Dan wants results discussed privately
jokes.punchline: Dan describing himself as éclair filling between lesbian couple
jokes.explanation: Excellent wordplay and perfect Dan sexual metaphor. Great economy and originality.

jokes.text: So, I've been pulling out this entire time for nothing?
jokes.setup: Doctor explaining Dan has low sperm motility
jokes.punchline: Dan's first concern is wasted contraception effort
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dan narcissism - making fertility diagnosis about his sexual inconvenience.

jokes.text: Ladies, I am Danny Egan, and I will see you in the tomorrow
jokes.setup: Dan leaving after fertility consultation
jokes.punchline: Garbled famous movie line exit
jokes.explanation: Minor Dan character moment with mangled reference, competent but not exceptional.

jokes.text: Did I die? Is this heaven? Yeah, he keeps waking up and asking that
jokes.setup: Gary waking up in hospital
jokes.punchline: Repeatedly thinking he's dead and in heaven
jokes.explanation: Good running gag setup showing Gary's childlike confusion and Richard's matter-of-fact response.

jokes.text: You had a heart attack, Gary. For the third freaking time.
jokes.setup: Gary confused about his condition
jokes.punchline: Reveals Gary's absurd medical history
jokes.explanation: Good escalation revealing Gary's ridiculous vulnerability and Richard's exasperation.

jokes.text: No, I had a heart episode and they're just gonna pop a stent in there just for fun
jokes.setup: Someone asking if Selina also had heart attack
jokes.punchline: Minimizing major cardiac procedure as casual fun
jokes.explanation: Good Selina denial mechanism - making serious medical intervention sound recreational.

jokes.text: Just think... next year, you get to go to my library opening. And you get to buy my book. Can't you just give me a copy? Well, I can't be giving out free copies of the book 'cause think of the position that that would put me in.
jokes.setup: Selina trying to cheer up dying Gary with future events
jokes.punchline: Refusing to give free copy to loyal dying assistant
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina selfishness - even charity to dying loyal employee could compromise her business model.

jokes.text: You're only 40? And I'm gonna... I'm gonna have a party. In Alabama.
jokes.setup: Gary mentioning he'll turn 40
jokes.punchline: Selina's shocked reaction and promise of party in random awful location
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Selina's surprise at Gary's age and half-hearted party promise.

jokes.text: If anybody asks, you just say I'm in a routine closed-door meeting, okay? If they're wondering why I'm at the hospital, you just put that on Gary 'cause he had a massive heart attack, luckily.
jokes.setup: Selina giving cover story instructions
jokes.punchline: Calling Gary's heart attack 'lucky' as cover for her own
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina darkness - Gary's medical crisis is fortunate PR cover for her own weakness.

jokes.text: 'Cause I don't know the alarm code to get back into my house
jokes.setup: Selina checking that Gary will be okay
jokes.punchline: Her concern is really about home security access
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina self-interest masquerading as concern - Gary's value is purely functional.

jokes.text: Just give him that whale dong Jonah, my God
jokes.setup: Need to give Sherman Tanz a name for lobbying
jokes.punchline: Describing Jonah with marine mammal genital comparison
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Selina insult combining Jonah's height with grotesque sexual imagery. Peak vulgarity.

jokes.text: Well, well, well. If it isn't the prodigal traitor come back home to suck on my giant congressional ball
jokes.setup: Jonah thinking he's getting important call
jokes.punchline: Ridiculous biblical/sexual metaphor mashup
jokes.explanation: Typical Jonah attempting sophistication with garbled biblical reference and crude sexual imagery.

jokes.text: Listen, jizz clot, I can't believe I'm saying this, but you're gonna have a meeting with Sherman Tanz
jokes.setup: Amy calling Jonah back
jokes.punchline: Grotesque insult followed by professional opportunity
jokes.explanation: Great Amy insult creativity with perfect professional pivot. 'Jizz clot' is memorably disgusting.

jokes.text: No. He's a prison magnet
jokes.setup: Ben and Kent explaining who Sherman Tanz is
jokes.punchline: Jonah's malapropism of 'magnate' as 'magnet'
jokes.explanation: Classic Jonah malapropism - perfect character stupidity with good economy.

jokes.text: when people think about what's wrong in Washington, they think of him and you
jokes.setup: Kent describing Sherman Tanz's reputation
jokes.punchline: Casually including Jonah as equally corrupt symbol
jokes.explanation: Good Kent deadpan burn - treating Jonah as equivalent to notorious corruption symbol.

jokes.text: Well, for you, Congressman, disaster would be a step up
jokes.setup: Ben warning about association with Tanz spelling disaster
jokes.punchline: Saying disaster would improve Jonah's standing
jokes.explanation: Excellent Ben burn with perfect structure and economy - disaster as career advancement.

jokes.text: I have insider confirmation that Selina Meyer is being considered for the open Supreme Court seat. To what, reupholster it?
jokes.setup: Danny reporting Supreme Court scoop
jokes.punchline: Jane's dismissive furniture joke about Selina's qualifications
jokes.explanation: Sharp Jane putdown with good wordplay on Supreme Court 'seat' - perfectly dismissive.

jokes.text: Why don't you talk to Jane? You're her man. / Yeah, right.
jokes.setup: Stevie suggesting Danny has influence with Jane
jokes.punchline: Danny's sarcastic response revealing his lack of actual influence
jokes.explanation: Good character beat showing Danny's self-delusion about his relationship with Jane being punctured.

jokes.text: They're actually from a very expensive boutique
jokes.setup: Selina assuming flowers are from bodega
jokes.punchline: Catherine's defensive correction about flower expense
jokes.explanation: Minor character moment showing Catherine's sensitivity to her mother's assumptions.

jokes.text: Whoo, that Montez is a Latin piece of ass
jokes.setup: Montez appearing on TV discussing nominations
jokes.punchline: Medicated Gary making inappropriate sexual comment
jokes.explanation: Standard drugged patient inappropriate comment, elevated by being completely out of character for Gary.

jokes.text: Yes, my roommates Stashelle, Lark, and Boosh
jokes.setup: Nurse asking if Gary has someone to care for him at home
jokes.punchline: Gary's ridiculous hipster roommate names
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurd names that sound like hipster parody. Perfect Gary pathetic living situation.

jokes.text: Peek-a-boo, peek-a-boo!
jokes.setup: Gary celebrating Selina being on short list
jokes.punchline: Playing peek-a-boo like a child while on medication
jokes.explanation: Simple physical comedy showing Gary's childlike behavior under medication. Basic but character-appropriate.

jokes.text: Madam President, may I say from one vet to another, congratulations. / Oh, God, this is the second act that Selina Meyer finally deserves.
jokes.setup: Doctor congratulating Selina on Supreme Court consideration
jokes.punchline: Selina's grandiose self-assessment of deserving this 'second act'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina self-aggrandizement - turning speculation into destiny narrative. Very character-consistent.

jokes.text: We share a studio in Hoboken. Your mom doesn't think you're pretty, but I think you're stunning.
jokes.setup: Gary explaining his living situation
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate compliment to nurse mid-conversation
jokes.explanation: Good Gary moment showing his drugged inappropriate behavior and sad living situation.

jokes.text: Monday, it's the day after Daylight Saving Time. It's my favorite holiday 'cause it's like living in a tiny version of 'Back to the Future'
jokes.setup: Planning meeting for Monday
jokes.punchline: Richard's bizarre enthusiasm for time change as movie experience
jokes.explanation: Perfect Richard weirdness - finding profound joy in mundane administrative time change.

jokes.text: I catch the 4:28 PATH... then I take the F to the 6, and then I do a quick jaunt, and I'm there in time to steep the tea
jokes.setup: Gary explaining his commute from New Jersey
jokes.punchline: Elaborate transit route to perform domestic service
jokes.explanation: Good Gary pathetic devotion - epic commute for basic domestic service shows his dedication.

jokes.text: Put him in the basement. I don't give a shit. Fine, the basement. Who gives a shit?
jokes.setup: Discussion of where Gary should stay while recovering
jokes.punchline: Selina's dismissive decision relegating him to basement
jokes.explanation: Standard Selina callousness toward Gary, showing her casual cruelty to loyal staff.

jokes.text: Your mom doesn't think you're pretty, but I think you're stunning.
jokes.setup: Gary talking to hospital nurse while on medication
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate personal comment to medical professional
jokes.explanation: Good medicated Gary moment - inappropriate but innocent comment showing his drugged state and basic kindness.

jokes.text: They're gonna have to carry me out of there with the gavel clenched in my cold, dead twat
jokes.setup: Selina excited about lifetime Supreme Court appointment
jokes.punchline: Grotesque variation on 'cold dead hands' with sexual imagery
jokes.explanation: Peak Selina vulgarity - brilliant subversion of NRA slogan with trademark sexual crudeness. Instant classic.

jokes.text: Well, I can give them my actual abortion if I could find it lying around here somewhere. I'll check the freezer.
jokes.setup: Judiciary Committee wants Selina's writings on abortion
jokes.punchline: Offering actual fetal remains as evidence, Gary volunteering to look
jokes.explanation: Extremely dark humor with Gary's helpful earnestness making it even more disturbing. Perfect boundary-pushing.

jokes.text: I'm sorry, Mama. Bunny's late for middle school.
jokes.setup: Catherine visiting her mother in hospital
jokes.punchline: Treating adult daughter like child with pet name and fake school excuse
jokes.explanation: Good Catherine character moment showing infantilizing dynamic with her mother.

jokes.text: The big hand points to the noon and the little hand points to the... Well, fuck, it's the... God, it's 10:00 AM.
jokes.setup: Ben sarcastically explaining clock reading to Jonah
jokes.punchline: Jonah's confusion getting worse as he tries to follow the explanation
jokes.explanation: Good Jonah stupidity escalation - getting more confused by simple explanation.

jokes.text: Getting paid, getting laid, son. Zero dollars and one cent.
jokes.setup: Jonah asking if Sherman will make campaign contribution
jokes.punchline: Sherman's rhyming promise followed by insulting penny donation
jokes.explanation: Perfect setup and payoff - catchy rhyme followed by ultimate insult of penny donation.

jokes.text: Did you have a stroke, you weird asshole man?
jokes.setup: Sherman's insulting penny donation
jokes.punchline: Jonah's medically inappropriate and ineffective comeback
jokes.explanation: Typical Jonah weak comeback showing his incompetence at insults and social situations.

jokes.text: I cut up a chicken sandwich and I put it into pasta. What? Is this the chicken sandwich that was in the fridge before the hospital? Wow, and you left the bun on it when you cut it.
jokes.setup: Gary proudly describing his cooking for Selina
jokes.punchline: Reveals he made pasta with old sandwich including bread
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary incompetence - well-meaning but disgusting food preparation showing his limited life skills.

jokes.text: It's the bleu cheese. No, but there isn't any bleu cheese in it. You must be... starving yourself, though.
jokes.setup: Selina noting the food smells funky
jokes.punchline: Gary making up explanation then pivoting to food guilt
jokes.explanation: Good Gary defensive lying followed by typical concern about Selina's eating habits.

jokes.text: I mean, I couldn't finish it. I just threw the rest out.
jokes.setup: Selina describing her good hospital meal
jokes.punchline: Casually mentioning wasting food while Gary made gross leftovers
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina obliviousness - waste good food while Gary makes terrible effort for her.

jokes.text: Is that what she calls you when she puts her penis in your vagina?
jokes.setup: Colleague offering Danny a cookie
jokes.punchline: Danny's completely inappropriate sexual response
jokes.explanation: Typical Danny inappropriate sexual comment, but lacks cleverness or originality. Basic shock humor.

jokes.text: I set my watch back for Daylight Savings Time. You set your watch the wrong way. No, it's spring. I 'springed' backwards.
jokes.setup: Jonah being late and confused about time change
jokes.punchline: Inventing word 'springed' and getting direction wrong
jokes.explanation: Good Jonah stupidity - multiple errors including made-up verb and wrong understanding.

jokes.text: Plus-sized homunculus. A human-shaped creature of medieval legend that Paracelsus claimed was created from putrefied sperm.
jokes.setup: Ben calling Jonah a plus-sized homunculus
jokes.punchline: Kent providing detailed etymological explanation
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Ben insult with perfect Kent follow-up. Obscure but devastating comparison to sperm creature.

jokes.text: I've had my own bedtime since I was 17. I didn't need a babysitter then and I don't need one now, and it's high time that the government stop trying to babysit all of us.
jokes.setup: Jonah ranting about Daylight Saving Time to reporter
jokes.punchline: Connecting time change to personal bedtime freedom since age 17
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jonah connecting policy to personal grievance about childhood bedtimes. Good character consistency.

jokes.text: I get it. Jonah Ryan. He's young, he's raw, he's a fresh, if slightly deformed, face that I can ride like a hobby horse.
jokes.setup: Sherman explaining his support for Jonah
jokes.punchline: Describing Jonah as deformed riding toy
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Sherman assessment combining political cynicism with perfect physical description of Jonah.

jokes.text: On the bright side, it's gonna be an amazing new exhibit at the Hughes Library
jokes.setup: Selina learning she lost Supreme Court nomination to Hughes
jokes.punchline: Gary's consolation about Hughes getting library exhibit
jokes.explanation: Good Gary attempt at consolation that accidentally makes things worse by highlighting Hughes' success.

jokes.text: Daylight Saving... not plural... Time has never saved us from anything, certainly not the higher energy costs it promised to lower.
jokes.setup: Jonah giving speech written by Tanz lobbyists
jokes.punchline: Jonah actually sounding competent when reading others' words
jokes.explanation: Good callback showing how competent Jonah can sound when others do the thinking. The irony works well.
